name: Marble Run Simulator
author: Poki
description: Marble Run Simulator is a simulation game where you can build your own intricate marble machines! Choose from a variety of track shapes, from simple ramps and turns to complex elevators. Piece them together to create your ultimate marble run. Start the balls rolling and rotate your camera to view your creation from different angles. Get inspired by exploring well-crafted demos. The fun never stops as the marble balls keep rolling! Are you ready to design your masterpiece? How to play Marble Run Simulator? Click to select different parts and drag to move them Who created Marble Run Simulator? Marble Run Simulator is created by Tiaratum Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Marble Run Simulator for free? You can play Marble Run Simulator for free on Poki. Can I play Marble Run Simulator on mobile devices and desktop? Marble Run Simulator can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
